rulings.Case Title: EDWARD MAGEE VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Kaiser Gypsum Company, Incs Motion To Compel Production Of Pathology
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, JANUARY 16, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.¿s motion to compel production of pathology is denied. The Court does not have authority to consider this motion. (See C.C.P. 2024.020; Pelton-Shepherd Industries v. Delta Packaging Products (2008) 165 Cal.App.4th 1568.) If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30a.m., not 9:00a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY WILLIAMS, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al VS. DOES 1 THROUGH 75, INCLUSIVE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs To Respond To Standard Friction Interrogatories Nos. 15, 16 And 17 And Standard Wrongful Death Interrogatories Nos. 48, 49 And 50, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, JANUARY 16, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 2, Defendant AutoZone West, Inc.¿s motion to compel plaintiffs to respond to standard friction interrogatories nos. 15, 16 and 17 and standard wrongful death interrogatories nos. 48, 49 and 50 and request for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)
